faqs.question: How much does wasp removal cost in Farmingdale?
faqs.answer: Our wasp removal service in Farmingdale typically costs between $350 and $550, depending on the nest size, location, and accessibility. We provide free estimates and transparent pricing with no hidden fees before starting any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a wasp nest in Farmingdale?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day wasp removal service in Farmingdale for emergency situations. Most wasp nest removals are completed within 1-2 hours, and we can typically arrive at your property within 2-4 hours of your call during business hours.

faqs.question: Is wasp removal safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our certified technicians use EPA-approved products and proven safety protocols to eliminate wasp nests while minimizing risk to your family, pets, and property. We recommend keeping children and pets indoors during treatment, and the area is typically safe within a few hours.

faqs.question: What types of wasps are common in Farmingdale, Long Island?
faqs.answer: Farmingdale residents commonly encounter yellow jackets, paper wasps, and bald-faced hornets. These species often build nests in eaves, attics, trees, and underground. Our team has extensive experience identifying and safely removing all wasp species found throughout Long Island.
